title: Add post-login routing (check onboarding_complete)
description: Write the handlePostLogin() function used by the login page to check profile state and route users to the right place.
acceptance_criteria: handlePostLogin() fetches profile for the current user
If onboarding_complete is false or null, redirect to /onboarding/role
If role is 'tenant' and onboarding_complete is true, redirect to /search
If role is 'landlord' and onboarding_complete is true, redirect to /listings

steps.details: export async function handlePostLogin() { const { data: { session } } = await supabase.auth.getSession(); if (!session) return; const { data: profile } = await supabase.from('profiles').select('role, onboarding_complete').eq('id', session.user.id).single(); if (!profile || !profile.onboarding_complete) { window.location.href = '/onboarding/role'; return; } window.location.href = profile.role === 'landlord' ? '/listings' : '/search'; }

technical_notes: This is the same logic as TASK-018 handlePostAuth — extract into a shared auth-utils.js to avoid duplication.
